title: OreSpawn Adventure
description: A modpack fully based around the Orespawn!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OreSpawn_Adventure/BH_OSA_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OreSpawn_Adventure/BH_OSA_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OreSpawn_Adventure/BH_OSA_overview.webp)
---

**OreSpawn Adventure** is a fantasy styled modpack based on the Craziness Awakened Mod. Enjoy a world filled with mythical beasts, crazy dimensions, overpowered weapons and more! Enjoy a sense of nostalgia when traversing these magical lands. This modpack is built for fun, enjoy a hassle-free playthrough with plenty of quality-of-life mods and exciting new mobs, armour, weapons and more...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/adventure-orespawn)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adventure-orespawn)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OreSpawn_Adventure/BH_OSA_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Orespawn** - Nostalgia, adventure and excitement all packed into one!

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OreSpawn_Adventure/BH_OSA_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
